description_long: This kiosk features a three-panel, angular structure with a wide, open front and two side walls that create a semi-enclosed space. The interior walls are adorned with large, high-resolution cityscape graphics, depicting modern skyscrapers and a blue sky, giving the kiosk a contemporary and urban feel. At the center of the kiosk is a compact counter or desk area, likely intended for customer interaction or service. The exterior surfaces are plain and white, contrasting with the vibrant interior graphics. The kiosk is designed to be visually inviting from the front, with no visible doors or windows, and the back and sides are solid and unadorned. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for use in public plazas, exhibition spaces, or commercial environments.
description: A modern, three-panel kiosk with cityscape graphics on the interior and a central counter, featuring a wide open front and plain white exterior surfaces.
description_view_0: The kiosk is seen from the front, showcasing the open entry, cityscape graphics on the interior walls, and a central counter.
description_view_1: A side angle reveals the solid white exterior panel and a partial glimpse of the interior graphics and counter.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain, unadorned white back panels with no openings or graphics visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side angle shows the other solid white exterior panel and a partial view of the interior graphics.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated into the interior wall panels, featuring cityscape graphics; no visible text or symbols.
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, continuous with the wall panels, no overhangs or decorative elements, finished in white.
